description: Small fragment from a ketubba in the Palestinian style. Location: Probably Tyre. Dating: Second half of the 11th century. In the hand of the ḥaver ʿAmram b. Ṣedaqa (who also wrote PER H 1 + ENA 4101.36 in Tyre in 1079 CE, T-S 16.136, and T-S AS 156.394). Bride: [Sitthum?] bt. Mevorakh. See M. A. Friedman's edition for further information.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
